summary: Draggable tmux session cards, scrollable terminal controls, and marketing site feature coverage.

introduced: Active tmux sessions appear as draggable cards with attach, copy-command, and destroy actions
Terminal controls panel scrolls while the embedded terminal keeps a minimum height
Marketing website Workspaces section documents all seven macOS sidebar panes
changed: tmux session card order persists across refresh and relaunch
Marketing site platform features cover Music, Terminal, breaking news, Nucleus AI, and reorderable sidebar
